summary: Planned conservative inventory triage for five listed PRs. No shared canonical was selected because this is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Already-closed #63007 is kept closed; the remaining open PRs are kept open or routed to maintainer review based on hydrated PR state, draft status, checks, and review evidence.
